body_html:
Hi Monica

Thank you for your payment! We’re happy to confirm your Group Catering Tasting with Comeketo Catering.

✅ Group Tasting Details

Date: May 17th
Time: 2pm
Location: 199 Main St., Fitchburg, MA


🍽️ Important Tasting Information

  • Group tasting tickets are non-refundable.
  • If you decide to move forward and book catering services with us, the tasting fee for the couple (up to 2 guests only) will be applied as a credit toward your invoice.

💡 How to Prepare

  • Please let us know in advance if you have any dietary restrictions or allergies.
  • Feel free to write down any questions — the tasting is a great opportunity to explore menu options and understand our process.
If you have any questions before the tasting, feel free to reply to this email. We’re happy to help.

We look forward to seeing you soon!







-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website




To stop receiving these emails, click here

body_text:
Hi Monica

  

Thank you for your payment! We’re happy to confirm your **Group Catering
Tasting** with **Comeketo Catering**.

  

### ✅ Group Tasting Details

**Date:** May 17th  
**Time:** 2pm  
**Location:** 199 Main St., Fitchburg, MA  
  

  

### 🍽️ Important Tasting Information

  * Group tasting tickets are **non-refundable**.

  * If you decide to move forward and book catering services with us, the tasting fee for the couple (**up to 2 guests only**) will be applied as a **credit toward your invoice**.

### 💡 How to Prepare

  * Please let us know in advance if you have any **dietary restrictions or allergies**.

  * Feel free to write down any questions — the tasting is a great opportunity to explore menu options and understand our process.

If you have any questions before the tasting, feel free to reply to this
email. We’re happy to help.

  

We look forward to seeing you soon!  
  
  

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**  
 _​​_ Catering Event Coordinator

📲 C: [(978) 235-3791](tel:19782353791)

📲 W: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)

  

  

  

  

To stop receiving these emails, click
